# Copilot Instructions â€” InfoCard PCF

## What this repo is

A Power Apps PCF **virtual (React) control** that renders multiple read-only fields as a compact card on Dynamics 365 model-driven forms (primarily Field Service Mobile). Namespace `Sample`, constructor `InfoCard`, publisher prefix `smp`. Shipped as a **sample** â€” customers should re-namespace before production rollout (see README â†’ "Re-namespacing for production").

Three projects:
- `InfoCardControl/` â€” PCF control (TypeScript + React 16, Fluent UI 9 as platform libs)
- `InfoCardSolution/` â€” clean shipping Dataverse solution wrapper (control-only, publisher `Sample` / prefix `smp`)
- `InfoCardSampleForm/` â€” test wrapper with form bindings on `bookableresourcebooking` (development only, **not** for shipping)

## Commands

All from `InfoCardControl/` unless noted:

```bash
npm install
npm run build           # pcf-scripts build (also runs lint + typegen)
npm run rebuild
npm run start           # browser harness
npm run lint            # eslint via pcf-scripts
npm run lint:fix
npm run refreshTypes    # regenerate generated/ManifestTypes.d.ts after manifest edits
npm test                # full jest suite
npx jest path/to/file.test.ts                       # single file
npx jest -t "test name substring"                   # single test by name
```

Solution build/deploy:
```bash
# Unmanaged (default â€” Solution.xml ships with <Managed>0</Managed>)
cd InfoCardSolution && dotnet build /p:SolutionPackageType=Unmanaged
#   â†’ InfoCardSolution/bin/Debug/InfoCardSolution.zip

# Managed: flip <Managed>0</Managed> â†’ <Managed>1</Managed> in src/Other/Solution.xml first
dotnet build /p:SolutionPackageType=Managed

# Or push the control directly during dev
pac pcf push --publisher-prefix smp

# Import to a Dataverse environment
pac solution import --path bin/Debug/InfoCardSolution.zip --publish-changes
```

**Always bump `version` in `ControlManifest.Input.xml` before `pac pcf push`** â€” Field Service Mobile caches aggressively.

## Architecture (the parts you must read multiple files to grok)

### Slot system
`ControlManifest.Input.xml` is the source of truth. It declares 23 typed property slots in groups (header, contact, address, details, grid, tags) plus 6 config props (`layout`, `hideEmptyFields`, `showCardBorder`, `showVersionInfo`, `startExpanded`, `showTitle`). Makers bind columns to slots in the form designer â€” slot **name** determines rendering role. All zones auto-hide when empty. `layout` selects one of three React renderers (`SmartCardLayout`, `ContactCardLayout`, `CompactFormLayout`) in `InfoCard.tsx` â€” they share the same five zones with different visual treatment.

### Data flow (Form XML â†’ React)
1. `Customizations.xml` configures each property either column-bound (`<slot type="â€¦">column</slot>`) or static (`<slot type="â€¦" static="true">literal</slot>`).
2. PCF runtime hands `index.ts` params with `{ type, raw, formatted, attributes }`. `readSlot()` (~L136 of `index.ts`) decides whether to keep, normalize, or discard each slot. It resolves lookups, formatted values, durations, and nulls into a uniform `InfoCardField`.
3. `detectRelatedFields()` (~L280) scans **raw params** (not the readSlot output) for `@`-prefixed values and builds fetch mappings keyed off the `titleField` lookup's entity/id.
4. A React `useEffect` in `InfoCard.tsx` (~L965) calls `fetchRelatedFields()` (~L366 in `index.ts`) which uses WebAPI `retrieveRecord`. `mergeRelatedFields()` (~L213) places fetched values into the right slot index.
5. Before rendering, `filterEmpty()` (~L169) drops empty fields when `hideEmptyFields` is true; `deduplicateSubtitles()` (~L197) removes case-insensitive subtitle duplicates.

### Related field syntax (`@`)
- `@fieldName` â€” 1-hop: fetch from the entity referenced by `titleField`'s lookup.
- `@lookupField.targetField` â€” 2-hop chained fetch.
- The pipeline only runs if `titleField` is a lookup with both `lookupEntityType` and `lookupId` populated; otherwise the entire fetch is skipped.

### Layout presets (`SLOT_PRESETS` in `index.ts`)
For known form entities (`msdyn_workorder`, `bookableresourcebooking`, `account`, `contact`, `incident`) the control auto-fills slots the maker did not bind. Maker bindings (any slot with a `type`) always win. Preset placeholders are marked `isPreset: true`; if their column resolves to empty after `resolveRecordFieldsAsync`, they're filtered out (so unmapped columns don't render as `---` rows). Skipped entirely in authoring mode (samples handle that path).

### Theme
`index.ts` reads `context.fluentDesignLanguage.tokenTheme` (Preview API) and maps tokens to `InfoCardTheme`, falling back to a hardcoded `defaultTheme`.

## Conventions specific to this codebase

- **Do not hand-edit `InfoCard/generated/ManifestTypes.d.ts`** â€” it's regenerated by `npm run build` / `npm run refreshTypes` from the manifest.
- **Manifest is the source of truth.** Adding/renaming/retyping a slot means: edit `ControlManifest.Input.xml` â†’ `npm run refreshTypes` â†’ update `index.ts` (`readSlotGroup` lists, related-field detection, slot-name index parsing in `mergeRelatedFields`) â†’ update `InfoCard.tsx` zone renderers â†’ update `Customizations.xml` form bindings.
- **Test scenario binding convention:** in `test-scenarios.json`, prefix bound-column values with `$` (e.g. `$telephone1`). The harness shim translates these to `param.raw` from `data.json`. Static values are literal strings; `@`-prefixed values trigger the related-field path.
- **Slot-name â†’ array-index mapping in `mergeRelatedFields`** matches by `slotKey` first (in-place replace), falling back to digit-derived position only when the slot is absent from the compacted array. When adding new slots in a group, ensure `readSlot` always stamps `slotKey = key` on the returned `SlotField` â€” that's what merge keys on.
- **Debug tracing:** set `window.__INFOCARD_DEBUG__ = true` in DevTools then re-trigger `updateView` to get one `[InfoCard.readSlot]` log per slot (including early-return reasons). Off by default; works uniformly for all slot groups.
- **Authoring-mode preview in `npm start` harness:** append `#authoring` (or `?authoring=1`) to the URL, or set `window.__INFOCARD_AUTHORING__ = true`. The control then takes the designer code path (sample injection, suppressed fetches), letting maker-side rendering be tested locally.
- **Known bug to be aware of (CLAUDE.md):** historic `readSlot` guard #3 dropped `static="true"` `@`-prefixed properties; the fix (`&& !param.type`) is now live at `index.ts:295` with a regression test. Don't reintroduce the old form of the guard.
- **Action links** are generated centrally â€” `tel:`, `mailto:`, `https:`, and map (`https://maps.google.com/?q=lat,lng` when both lat & lng slots resolve, else address text).
- **Duration auto-format:** numeric minutes are rendered as `Xh Xm` â€” the formatter lives in `InfoCard.tsx`.
- **React 16 + Fluent UI 9 are platform libraries** (declared in `ControlManifest.Input.xml`). Do not bundle them; the host provides them at runtime. Don't add competing icon libraries â€” icons are inline SVG in `InfoCard.tsx`.

## Tests

Jest + jsdom + `@testing-library/react`. Mock `ComponentFramework.Context` helpers live alongside `InfoCard/tests/`. Coverage spans slot resolution, related-field fetch logic, all three layouts, theme tokens, action-link generation, empty-field hiding, duration formatting, and the smart-card collapse behavior. When adding a slot or changing readSlot logic, add cases in both `index.test.ts` and `InfoCard.test.tsx`.

## Reference docs

- `README.md` â€” feature overview, slot tables, public API
- `CLAUDE.md` â€” deep-dive on the data-flow pipeline, current form configuration on `bookableresourcebooking`, and the readSlot guard bug
- `docs/` â€” design history (v1 superseded by v2 slot-based approach)
